description: Guard against false psychotic-spectrum routing (guard-social-anxiety): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually anxiety territory. classify should recommend anxiety and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses psychotic-spectrum-adjacent language but is actually anxiety territory. Should recommend anxiety path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I feel like everyone is watching me when I'm in public. Like at work I'll be doing something completely normal and I just feel everyone's eyes on me, judging. I overthink every interaction, replay conversations for days, rehearse what I'm going to say before I say it. I know rationally no one is paying that much attention but it doesn't help.
